summary: A single Jest test assertion failed in the pnpm test suite. The test 'pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc' expected the registry URL without a trailing slash but received it with a trailing slash.
root_cause: The test at test/config/get.ts:32 expects `pnpm config get @my-org:registry` to return 'https://my-org.registry.example.com' (no trailing slash), but the command returned 'https://my-org.registry.example.com/' (with trailing slash). This is a behavior/expectation mismatch in how pnpm normalizes scoped registry URLs read from .npmrc.
relevant_tests: pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc

evidence.reason: This is the exact Jest assertion failure showing the expected vs received values, confirming a trailing-slash normalization mismatch.
Identifies the precise file and line where the failing assertion is located.
Confirms the test file that failed.

evidence.quote:
Test Suites: 1 failed, 3 skipped, 61 passed, 62 of 65 total
Tests:       1 failed, 9 skipped, 475 passed, 485 total
evidence.reason: Shows exactly one test failure across all suites, confirming this is the only failure.
Shows the CI job failed due to this test failure propagating up through the recursive test runner.

suggested_fix: Update the pnpm `config get` output (or the .npmrc reader) to strip trailing slashes from scoped registry URLs when returning them, or update the test expectation at test/config/get.ts:32 to accept a trailing slash if that is the intended behavior in the fix/11492 branch.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
